items.caption: A weather forecast on a smartphone screen. the forecast is for the city of livonia, with the current temperature at 37 degrees fahrenheit. the forecast shows a high of 45 degrees and a low of 34 degrees for the day. the weather is expected to be partly cloudy with a chance of rain. the forecast also indicates a thunderstorm is expected in the afternoon. the background of the image shows a dramatic sky with dark clouds and lightning bolts, emphasizing the weather conditions.
